repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Media and Technology Services

did.physdesc: Correspondence, reports, policies, slides, photographs, and videotapes
did.abstract: Correspondence, reports, policies, slides, photographs, videotapes, and other material of the office of Media and Technology Services; including the files of the first director Christopher Whittle and information on the New York State Fair, Empire Farm Days and the Educational Television Center.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, reports, policies, slides, photographs, videotapes, and other material of the office of Media and Technology Services; including the files of the first director Christopher Whittle and information on the New York State Fair, Empire Farm Days and the Educational Television Center.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Media and Technology Services Records, #21-36-3152. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

unittitle.extref: Link to a partial finding aid.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.

did.unittitle: Christopher Whittle: First Director of Media Services
History of the Acquisition and Use of a Mobile Satellite Uplink Truck
Media Services Space Study: An Attempt to Create a Single Building to House the Department
ETV, Educational Television Center, Miscellaneous Background and History

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: When the ETV Center was first created in the new wing of MVR Hall, College of Human Ecology, it was administered by the Department of Communication Arts. In 1975, when the Broadhead report created the Department of Media Services, separate from Communication Arts, the ETV Center was merged into the new Media Services Department under Christopher Whittle

did.unittitle: Food and Life Sciences Quarterly/FOCUS: History of the College of Agriculture's Journal of Research for a Lay Audience and Media Services Role in its Production
David, Watkins Jr. - Second Director of Media Services
Empire Farm Days: Media Services Role
CCESN, Cornell Cooperative Extension Satellite Network Downlink Sites
Media Services: Creation of University Photography
Media Services: Historical Policy and Information
Asia Tour: ETV Center and Cornell Glee Club
Media Services: Nutrition PSA's, ETV Center
Media Services: Marketing, Mission, Values and Philosophy
Media Services: Radio: FOCUS Proposal to go National with NPR Type Programming
Media Services: Computer Network: Creation of…
Media and Technology Services: Web Production Unit, Creation and Costs
Photos: State Fair Youth Building - CCE County Exhibits
State Fair: Budgets, Plans, Animations, Telerama, Staffing, Etc.
Save Energy/Save Dollars: A Copy of Products and Results
Publication Study by J. Francis Cooper
Ed Wright Letters: (First Chief Engineer of the ETV Center)
Cornell Sports Network Proposal by Media Services Staff

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A study commissioned by David Watkins for a grad student in the Department of Communication Arts of the Communication Needs and Perceptions of Extension Field Staff

did.unittitle: Robert Seem Committee Communication Needs Report and Notes
Telecommunications Report Commissioned by William Lacy, Director, CCE
State of the Media Services Unit
Media and Technology Services Self Study Document Prepared for the Departmental External Review
CCE Public Awareness Files and Products produced by Media Services
Proposal for Regional Training and Satellite Downlink Sites
CCESN, Cornell Cooperative Extension Satellite Network Background/Network
Broadhead Report: Study of the Department of Communication Arts that created Media Services
Packet: CCESN Dist. Learning Report, Working with the Media, List of CCESN Sites
MS. Senior Staff Meeting Notes: Policy Discussions etc.
Series III. Annual Reports/Budget Hearing and Program Planning Materials
Description of Technologies: Television, Satellite, Computer and the Departments Role for the University
Survey of MS Staff: Work, Job Satisfaction, Policy and Procedures
Merger Attempts: MS and University Relations
Program Planning and Budget Hearing Materials (1979-2000/01 FYS)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: From 1995/1996 on annual reports were included in the program planning and budget conferences held with Human Ecology, Agriculture and Life Sciences and Cornell Cooperative Extension

did.unittitle: Media Services Administrative Committee Files/Meeting Notes Etc.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The Administrative Committee for Media Services was created by the Broadhead Report. It consisted of the Deans of Agriculture, Human Ecology and the Director of Cornell Cooperative Extension. Meetings were called by the head of that committee but over the years were very infrequent

did.unittitle: Media Services First Computer System: Xerox Star System
Workshops/Training Sessions by Media Services Staff for CCE and Faculty
Christopher Whittle: First Director of Media Services
Cornell Cooperative Extension: Public Awareness and Marketing Campaigns, Products, Files, Organization, Training Sessions by Robert Topor, David Watkins and Bill Boldt
CCE Associations Survey Results: Printing and Mailing Technologies by James Mason
CCE Associations Survey on Printing and Mailing Technologies Raw Data by County

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Prepared by Media Services for CCE

did.unittitle: A Self-Study of the Department's Organization, Services, Funding Issues, and Relationships in Preparation for an External Review to be Conducted
